# JDBC Method Support Matrix

Generated by `./gradlew generateJdbcMethodSupport` for Java release 11.

Target interfaces: Driver, Connection, Statement, PreparedStatement, ResultSet, ResultSetMetaData, DatabaseMetaData, Wrapper.

| Interface | Method | MVP status | Behavior | Failure policy | Phase | Test owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Driver` | `acceptsURL(java.lang.String): boolean` | supported | Returns true for non-null URLs starting with `jdbc:sshsqlite:`. | SQLException from local validation or remote sqlite3/protocol failures is propagated with the driver SQLState; closed objects use SQLState `08003` or `HY010`. | current driver | URL/config tests |
| `Driver` | `connect(java.lang.String, java.util.Properties): java.sql.Connection` | supported | Accepts `jdbc:sshsqlite:` URLs, opens the SSH/local sqlite3 transport, and returns an `SshSqliteConnection`; returns null for non-matching URLs. | SQLException from local validation or remote sqlite3/protocol failures is propagated with the driver SQLState; closed objects use SQLState `08003` or `HY010`. | current driver | URL/config tests and integration tests |
| `Driver` | `getMajorVersion(): int` | conservative-constant | Returns driver major version `0`. | Closed objects throw the interface-specific closed-state `SQLException` when the implementation checks object state. | current driver | JDBC contract tests |
| `Driver` | `getMinorVersion(): int` | conservative-constant | Returns driver minor version `1`. | Closed objects throw the interface-specific closed-state `SQLException` when the implementation checks object state. | current driver | JDBC contract tests |
| `Driver` | `getParentLogger(): java.util.logging.Logger` | unsupported-feature | Optional JDBC feature is not implemented by this driver. | Open objects throw `SQLFeatureNotSupportedException` with SQLState `0A000`; closed objects throw `SQLException` with SQLState `08003` for connections or `HY010` for statements/result sets. | current driver | JDBC reflection tests |
| `Driver` | `getPropertyInfo(java.lang.String, java.util.Properties): java.sql.DriverPropertyInfo[]` | conservative-constant | Returns an empty `DriverPropertyInfo` array. | Closed objects throw the interface-specific closed-state `SQLException` when the implementation checks object state. | current driver | JDBC contract tests |
| `Driver` | `jdbcCompliant(): boolean` | conservative-constant | Returns false. | Closed objects throw the interface-specific closed-state `SQLException` when the implementation checks object state. | current driver | JDBC contract tests |

| `Connection` | `beginRequest(): void` | unsupported-feature | Optional JDBC feature is not implemented by this driver. | Open objects throw `SQLFeatureNotSupportedException` with SQLState `0A000`; closed objects throw `SQLException` with SQLState `08003` for connections or `HY010` for statements/result sets. | current driver | JDBC reflection tests |
